name: cp-net-adapter
description: Compatibility with the real, currently-running .NET Content Provider via its HTTP /invoke endpoint. Read-only in Stage 1 (GetItem, GetByNames, GetManyByName, FindRecursively) — Put/PostParentItem exist but are Stage 3 scope. Modeled on packages/dba's proven invokeContentProvider client, NOT on legacy-content-provider/typescript_runner (which spawns `dotnet run` against an old, separate SimpleRun CLI project rather than calling the actual running API — confirmed by reading its source, not assumed).
